# Pingsy

> Real-time website uptime monitoring. Pingsy monitors your websites 24/7 and alerts you instantly when downtime is detected.

## Key Features

- **Decentralized Uptime Monitoring:** Distributed validator nodes verify website status.
- **Real-Time Dashboards:** Clean interface to track latencies and check histories.
- **Instant Alerts:** Get notified the moment your site goes down.
- **Simple Setup:** Enter your URL and monitor within seconds.

## Main Pages

- [Landing Page & Dashboard](https://pingsy.akemnoorsingh.xyz): View current website statuses, latencies, and add new URLs for monitoring.
